steps.t: Lindir is with Bilbo in the Hall of Fire at Rivendell. Bilbo told you that Lindir has a new riddle to offer, one out of Gondor.
The answer to Lindir's riddle can be found somewhere in Rivendell. Lindir has asked you to find an item that provides an answer to his riddle. Breath …
Lindir is with Bilbo in the Hall of Fire in the Last Homely House. Boromir has given you a token that provides the answer to Lindir's riddle and told …
